description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the maven:3.3.9-jdk-8 Docker image, caches the .m2/repository and target directories, and defines MAVEN_CLI_OPTS and MAVEN_OPTS variables as given. Define three stages: compile, test, and package. In the compile stage add a compile job that runs `mvn $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS clean compile`. In the test stage add a test job that runs `mvn $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS test`. In the package stage add a package job that runs `mvn $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS package` and publishes the resulting target/*.jar files as artifacts.
